_comment: Property/Agent Instance Configuration — for multi-instance Mac mini deployments

property.notes: Set these values when deploying to a specific property

agent.notes: Each Mac mini runs one agent instance. Set instanceId to match the property.

network.notes: Central server for property coordination. Set when deploying fleet.

deployment.notes: demo = current standalone mode. single-property = one property, one agent. fleet = multiple properties reporting to central.
